features: ️ Large Size & Warm Colors Placemat size is about 16.5"/42cm long and 12.6"/32cm wide. The size is large enough to hold the ideal size for most dishes, perfect for dining table, kitchen table, family daily use, farmhouse table, wooden table, hotel, business office, picnic, etc. This lovely set of traditional Christmas placemats are available in natural linen color and can reflect shining golden tones when exposed to sunlight. They will become the highlight of the Christmas dinner.

Good Protection & Easy to Clean The table mat will protect your table from scratches and stains, heat resistant, stain resistant, non slip and perfect for everyday use. You can use these beautiful home style holiday placemats at Christmas parties to increase the warm atmosphere of Christmas. The rustic placemat is easy to clean and you only need to wipe it with a damp cloth after finishing dinner. Excellent for family parties and Christmas decorations.

️ High Quality Materials These square Christmas placemats for dining table made of high quality natural linen with higher fabric strength are durable, lightweight and eco friendly. You can keep and use them for many years to come. Our beautiful placemats are washable, reusable and easy to fold flat to save space. Use them to bring your family and friends a special holiday dining memory.
International products have separate terms, are sold from abroad and may differ from local products, including fit, age ratings, and language of product, labeling or instructions.
